prompt:
A dark-themed desktop app settings panel UI screenshot. App called ImageView — a photo management tool. Tokyo Night color scheme: dark blue-gray background #1a1b26, surface panels #24283b, blue accent #7aa2f7, green #9ece6a, orange #e0af68, red #f7768e, purple #bb9af7, light text #c0caf5, dim text #565f89, borders #3b4261.

Modal overlay dialog, 520px wide, centered on dark backdrop. Title bar: 'Settings' with X close button.

Section 1 — GENERAL (uppercase label, dim):
- 'Close to tray' with green ON toggle pill
- 'Confirm before Trash' with green ON toggle pill  
- 'Auto-purge missing files' with green ON toggle pill (new setting)
- 'HTTP server' with OFF toggle pill and grayed out port input '9847'

Section 2 — API KEYS (uppercase label, dim):
Three provider rows, each with provider name, masked password input showing dots, and status:
- 'OpenAI' row: password field with 'sk-...' placeholder, green dot + 'Connected' text
- 'Google' row: password field with 'AIza...' placeholder, green dot + 'Connected' text  
- 'OpenRouter' row: password field empty, no status indicator, gray empty state
Small help text below: 'Stored securely in system keychain' in dim text with a lock icon

Section 3 — ACCESS TOKENS (uppercase label with '+ Create' button on right):
Two token rows on dark cards:
- 'Claude Code' with purple 'admin' badge, '2h ago' dim text, 'Rotate' and 'Revoke' buttons
- 'Cursor' with blue 'viewer' badge, '5d ago' dim text, 'Rotate' and 'Revoke' buttons

Section 4 — CLAUDE CODE CONFIG (uppercase label with 'Copy' button):
JSON code snippet in monospace on darker background showing mcpServers config

Pixel-perfect screenshot of a real macOS desktop app. No wireframe. Crisp text. Professional developer tool.
